connection.description: Name of the connection containing this identity.

user_id.description: Unique identifier of the user user for this identity.

isSocial.description: Whether this identity is from a social provider (true) or not (false).

access_token.description: IDP access token returned only if scope read:user_idp_tokens is defined.

access_token_secret.description: IDP access token secret returned only if scope read:user_idp_tokens is defined.

refresh_token.description: IDP refresh token returned only if scope read:user_idp_tokens is defined.
